overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a golden convertible driving through Night City at dusk. The vehicle navigates neon-lit commercial streets, passes under massive elevated highways, and encounters heavy traffic congestion in an urban underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with covered walkways

agents.ego_description: driving the golden convertible steadily through the neon-lit street following a lead vehicle

entered.detail: large illuminated billboards with red and white graphics on building facades
tropical palm trees lining the left side of the street
tall modern structures with glass and metal facades featuring neon accents
overhanging roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a golden convertible driving through a narrow commercial street lined with palm trees and futuristic buildings. Neon signage illuminates the scene with red and cyan hues while the vehicle maintains a steady speed behind traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection approach with marked crosswalks

events.description: vehicle passes over marked pedestrian crosswalk lines

agents.ego_description: continuing straight through the city street approaching a major intersection with elevated highways visible ahead

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving parallel in the left lane maintaining similar speed

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
large elevated highway structure visible in the distance spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through a medium-width street approaching an intersection, passing over crosswalk markings. The environment transitions from palm-lined boulevard to a more urban setting with elevated highway structures becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with distinctive orange arch monument

events.description: vehicle executes a right turn at the intersection following the lead car
passing under the large orange arch structure marking the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn at the major intersection while maintaining position behind the lead vehicle

notable_agents.action: white sedan ahead slowing down as it approaches the underpass entrance

entered.detail: large distinctive orange structural arch spanning across the intersection
curved elevated roadway structure with glass barriers

segments.scene_description: The convertible executes a right turn at a wide intersection dominated by a massive orange arch structure. The scene opens up to reveal elevated highway ramps and the vehicle aligns to enter a covered underpass ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass beneath elevated highway with neon advertisements

events.description: entering the darker underpass area where artificial neon lighting becomes dominant
traffic flow slows significantly as vehicles congest approaching the underpass exit

agents.ego_description: driving through the covered underpass following traffic as it gradually slows down

notable_agents.action: silver sedan in the left lane moving slowly alongside the ego vehicle

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the underpass with embedded lighting fixtures and ventilation
large cylindrical concrete columns supporting the elevated highway above
illuminated commercial signs and digital displays on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a semi-covered underpass beneath the elevated highway, where natural light fades and artificial neon illumination takes over. Traffic density increases as the car navigates between concrete support pillars and past glowing wall advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: congested underpass traffic jam with stopped vehicles

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop behind other cars in the traffic jam
vehicle pulls slightly to the right side of the lane near the barrier

agents.ego_description: bringing the convertible to a complete stop in the traffic jam and positioning near the right barrier

notable_agents.action: vehicle directly ahead with glowing red taillights stopped in traffic
black sports car stopped in the left lane adjacent to ego

entered.detail: orange and silver metal railing separating the road from the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle coming to a complete stop in a traffic jam within the underpass. The camera captures the stationary scene with other vehicles stopped ahead and to the left, while neon lights reflect off the golden car's surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a golden convertible as it travels from a vibrant, palm-lined commercial boulevard into the claustrophobic congestion of a neon-lit urban underpass. It begins by cruising through a narrow street where red and cyan neon signs illuminate the futuristic architecture and tropical greenery. As the vehicle passes over crosswalks and moves away from the boulevard, the environment shifts toward a denser urban landscape where massive elevated highway structures emerge in the distance. The scene then opens up during a right turn beneath a towering orange arch, leading the car directly into a semi-covered underpass where natural dusk light fades into artificial glows and concrete pillars. Finally, the camera captures the vehicle slowing to a complete stop amidst a dense traffic jam, with the surrounding neon advertisements reflecting off the car's golden surface.
